data.name: Way of Horny: Pleasure Night
data.detailed_description:
Way of Horny: Pleasure Night is a bite-sized adult puzzle series. Beat 24 puzzle stages to unlock 25 seductive Full HD H-scenes, then revisit your favorites anytime in the Gallery—with relaxing music to set the mood.

Features

  • Creative row/column-dragging match-3 gameplay with tactical elements and gradually increasing challenge

  • 25 ultra-high-quality Full HD illustrations and 25 animated H-scenes CGs

  • Chill music for a smooth, sexy vibe

  • Replay unlocked scenes in Gallery

data.short_description: Way of Horny: Pleasure Night is a straightforward horny puzzle game: clear the levels, earn the reward—hot, pleasure-packed H-scenes in Full HD.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
